topActions.title: Make contradiction sentinel the first founder/startup signal
topActions.rationale: Trust degrades fastest when contradiction pressure stays buried beneath score summaries.
topActions.firstStep: Promote the single highest-severity contradiction into founder brief, dashboard, and execution queue copy.
topActions.successMetric: Every executive surface starts with the top conflict and the guardrail for moving anyway.

topActions.title: Ship founder command mode from the shared bundle
topActions.rationale: The winning strategy is contrarian; founder consumption improves most when state, risk, and next move collapse into one command surface.
topActions.firstStep: Render highest risk, top action, approvals, and ignore-list from the shared intelligence bundle.
topActions.successMetric: Founder-facing CLI and MCP surfaces return one compressed executive command instead of parallel summaries.

topActions.title: Roll founder compression into all default surfaces
topActions.rationale: Founder command mode exists, but default score/dashboard/startup surfaces still leave compression as an extra step.
topActions.firstStep: Thread contradiction sentinel, execution headline, and strategy headline into dashboard, score, and founder outputs.
topActions.successMetric: A default IGNIS read now yields one contradiction-first executive readout without a separate founder mode hop.

topActions.title: Build a persistent evidence graph and contradiction map
topActions.rationale: Current evidence density is 4.95 and weakest pillar is creativity; traceability is the highest-leverage upgrade.
topActions.firstStep: Persist evidence nodes/edges per scoring run and expose contradiction-focused views.
topActions.successMetric: Every recommendation links to explicit evidence nodes with confidence and freshness.

topActions.title: Resolve strategy hit-rate against real outcomes
topActions.rationale: Strategy authority remains early; only 5 active market views exist and future score deltas need to harden them into evidence.
topActions.firstStep: Resolve open strategy-ledger entries whenever a new score run lands and grade them as win, mixed, or loss.
topActions.successMetric: Recommendation authority moves because measured outcomes changed, not because priors stayed sticky.

topActions.title: Add a ranked action intelligence layer
topActions.rationale: IGNIS already explains state well; it needs a top-EV action stack that directly targets creativity.
topActions.firstStep: Score actions by upside, confidence, effort, reversibility, urgency, and unblock value.
topActions.successMetric: Startup and MCP surfaces emit one ranked action list instead of flat recommendations.

topActions.title: Instrument calibration for predictions, recommendations, and warnings
topActions.rationale: Trend is positive, but IGNIS cannot yet prove its forecast quality over time.
topActions.firstStep: Write calibration metrics from score-history and prediction journals on every score run.
topActions.successMetric: Brier/error and recommendation hit-rate become first-class metrics.

topActions.title: Expose a strategy arbitration panel
topActions.rationale: The recommendation market is still partially opaque; authority needs a visible leaderboard before it will be trusted.
topActions.firstStep: Render authority, win rate, and average score delta for each strategy from the persistent ledger.
topActions.successMetric: Founder/default surfaces can explain not just the winner, but why that worldview currently deserves authority.

topActions.title: Age stale evidence aggressively inside the bundle
topActions.rationale: Average evidence freshness is 1.00 and 0% of nodes are already stale enough to deserve demotion.
topActions.firstStep: Use node freshness directly in evidence ranking, action density, and contradiction-sensitive summaries.
topActions.successMetric: Old signals lose steering power automatically instead of lingering at parity with fresh evidence.

topActions.title: Make personality adaptive to evidence quality and outcomes
topActions.rationale: Current voice is strong but too templated; it should earn assertiveness and skepticism from calibration and evidence quality.
topActions.firstStep: Derive posture, skepticism, novelty bias, and narrative mode from self-model and data quality.
topActions.successMetric: Voice state changes coherently across sparse, contradictory, and high-confidence contexts.

topActions.title: Expand MCP from read-only intelligence to guarded execution
topActions.rationale: Recommendation market consensus is Grade recommendations against outcomes, Demote uncalibrated heuristics automatically; execution tools are the next multiplier.
topActions.firstStep: Add write-capable MCP tools for score refresh, task creation, and evidence snapshots with explicit safety boundaries.
topActions.successMetric: Claude can safely trigger the highest-value studio actions through IGNIS.

topActions.title: Expand adapter coverage for richer evidence
topActions.rationale: PR reviews, deploys, incidents, analytics, revenue, and founder approvals are still missing from the evidence surface.
topActions.firstStep: Track expected-vs-present adapters and make the missing high-value signals visible in default outputs.
topActions.successMetric: Adapter expansion becomes a measurable evidence-quality gap instead of a vague backlog item.

topActions.title: Model cross-project leverage and contagion
topActions.rationale: IGNIS should identify multiplier projects, not just isolated local improvements.
topActions.firstStep: Read the portfolio baseline and rank projects whose improvement should create the most downstream studio leverage.
topActions.successMetric: Founder surfaces can point to portfolio moves with the strongest expected multiplier effect.

entries.summary: Stop adding pillars and make decisions measurable
entries.rationale: IGNIS already has enough systems; the leverage now comes from proving which ones actually work.

entries.summary: Stabilize truth fidelity before expanding scope
actions: Turn contradictions into first-class blocking signals
entries.rationale: The downside of adding more surface area before truth fidelity is stronger is still high.

actions: Expose concise executive summaries and approvals
entries.rationale: Founder usability is the bottleneck between current intelligence and real studio leverage.

entries.summary: Reduce model overreach and firm up CREATIVITY
actions: Instrument calibration before major scoring changes
entries.rationale: CREATIVITY remains fragile enough that uncalibrated expansion could outrun truth quality.

entries.summary: Use VITALITY momentum to expand studio reach
actions: Ship action intelligence and write-capable MCP tools
entries.rationale: VITALITY is carrying enough momentum that controlled expansion can compound current gains.

consensus: Turn contradictions into first-class blocking signals
